headlines.title: Ukraine Commemorates 40th Anniversary of Chornobyl Nuclear Disaster
headlines.summary: Ukraine marks the 40th anniversary of the world's worst nuclear disaster amid fears that Russia's ongoing war could spark a repeat catastrophe. Russia has repeatedly launched drones and missiles near the plant.

headlines.title: Mali Hit by Largest Jihadist Attack in Years
headlines.summary: Al Qaeda-linked group JNIM launched coordinated attacks across Mali, including the capital Bamako. The Defense Minister was reportedly killed in an attack on his residence at the Kati military base.

headlines.title: Israel Orders 'Forceful Attacks' on Hezbollah in Lebanon
headlines.summary: Netanyahu directed the IDF to attack Hezbollah targets after six people were killed by strikes in southern Lebanon. Hezbollah called the U.S.-mediated ceasefire extension 'meaningless.'

headlines.title: US-Iran War: Ceasefire Extended as Pakistan Hosts Negotiations
headlines.summary: The US extended its ceasefire with Iran until May 17. Pakistan is racing to save negotiations between the US and Iran, though Trump cancelled a planned envoy trip to Islamabad.

headlines.title: Trump and Officials 'Likely Targets' of Suspected Gunman at Event
headlines.summary: The acting attorney general stated that preliminary findings suggest a suspected gunman was specifically targeting members of the Trump administration. Incident occurred at a venue where shots were fired.

headlines.title: Two US Federal Agents Killed in Mexico Operation
headlines.summary: Two Americans who reportedly worked for the CIA died in a car crash after a Mexican-led operation to destroy a drug lab. Mexico says the agents were not authorized to participate in local operations.

headlines.title: Britain and Spain Reject Trump's Reported Plans for Punishment
headlines.summary: European allies alarmed by Trump limiting American support for Ukraine and staking claims to Greenland. Britain and Spain rejected reported plans by Trump to punish them.

headlines.title: US Imposes Sanctions on China-Based Oil Refinery Over Iranian Oil
headlines.summary: The US imposed sanctions on a China-based oil refinery and 40 shippers over Iranian oil smuggling. The US military also seized another tanker associated with Iranian oil smuggling.

headlines.title: Palestinians Vote in Local Elections in West Bank and Gaza
headlines.summary: Local elections held in the occupied West Bank and one Gazan city, though Hamas and other groups are not participating. First such elections in years.

headlines.title: Venezuela Prisoner Release Scheme 'Coming to an End'
headlines.summary: Rights groups critical as Venezuela's prisoner release scheme concludes. More than 500 political prisoners have been released under the program.
